summary: Iteration 6 Complete - All 3 vendor filter/drilldown features working: 1) Home page vendor dropdown filter updates ALL data (KPIs, charts, candidates), 2) Analysis page vendor row click opens detailed popup with member list table, 3) Job Openings modal shows Nominated Members section with candidate list.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/analytics/vendor-list returns 5 vendors (Antino, Bravia Services, Nsight, Quesscorp, Scrabble/Jigsaw)
Backend: /api/analytics/kpis-filtered?vendor=Antino returns filtered KPIs (16 total, 6 active, 4 shortlisted, 10 rejected)
Backend: /api/analytics/pipeline?vendor=Antino returns filtered pipeline stages
Backend: /api/analytics/vendor-detail?vendor_name=Antino returns detail with members list, stages, roles
Backend: /api/openings/nominees?role_name=Python+Fullstack returns 25 nominees
Backend: /api/candidates?vendor=Antino returns 16 candidates
Backend: All existing endpoints still work (no regressions)
Frontend: Home page has vendor dropdown filter (data-testid=vendor-filter)
Frontend: Vendor dropdown shows 'All Vendors' + 5 actual vendor names
Frontend: Selecting 'Antino' updates KPIs to show only Antino data (16 candidates, 6 active)
Frontend: Selecting vendor updates Pipeline by Stage chart
Frontend: Selecting vendor updates All Candidates table count (16)
Frontend: 'Showing data for: Antino' indicator appears when vendor selected
Frontend: Clear button resets vendor filter back to all data (59 candidates)
Frontend: Vendor filter works alongside date filters (30d, 90d, All)
Frontend: Analysis page vendor row click opens detailed popup
Frontend: Analysis vendor popup shows Total, Shortlisted, Selected, Rejected counts
Frontend: Analysis vendor popup shows Stage Breakdown section
Frontend: Analysis vendor popup shows Roles Contributed section
Frontend: Analysis vendor popup shows Members table with Name, Role, Stage, Exp columns
Frontend: Job Openings modal shows Nominated Members section (data-testid=nominees-section)
Frontend: Job Openings nominees table shows Name, Vendor, Stage, Exp columns
Frontend: Job Openings nominees shows actual candidate data
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data from Google Sheets sync (59 candidates, 38 openings, 5 vendors)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features from iteration 6 are working: 1) Home page vendor filter dropdown (data-testid=vendor-filter) updates KPIs, pipeline chart, and candidates table when vendor is selected. Clear button resets filter. 'Showing data for: [vendor]' indicator appears. Works with date filters. 2) Analysis page vendor row click opens detailed popup with summary metrics, stage breakdown, roles contributed, and scrollable members table. 3) Job Openings modal shows Nominated Members section (data-testid=nominees-section) with table showing Name, Vendor, Stage, Exp columns. Key data: Antino has 16 candidates (6 active, 4 shortlisted, 10 rejected), Python Fullstack has 25 nominees, 5 vendors total.

notes.verification_method: pytest backend tests + Playwright UI tests
